subcodes.first_line: O pure soul! True purity and freedom lie in detachment from all save God and steadfast adherence to His Covenant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جان پاک پاکی و آزادگی در انقطاع از ماسوی الله است و تشبث بعهد و میثاق الله
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @firmness in the Covenant, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
